title: Activity
description: List of board items for a Houston agent. Status is the engine-owned lifecycle enum; non-terminal rows carry a lease so the reaper can detect crashed runs.

status.description: queued: created, no CLI yet. running: lease held, CLI streaming. needs_you: stream ended cleanly, awaiting user. done: closed by user. error: stream ended with error. cancelled: user clicked Stop. interrupted: reaper found a stale lease, click Resume to continue.

lease.description: Durability ownership token. Present only on in-flight (queued/running) rows. The engine's heartbeat extends expires_at while the CLI runs; the reaper interrupts any row whose lease is past expires_at.
